shared_control_for_step_set_label: Which visible control label appears in each of steps {step_reference_list}?
For steps {step_reference_list}, what control label is shared by all of them?
What control chip label is common to steps {step_reference_list}?
Across steps {step_reference_list}, which control label appears every time?
Find steps {step_reference_list}. Which visible control label do those steps all share?
step_for_control_pair_label: Which step number contains both {first_control_label} and {second_control_label}?
Find the step with control labels {first_control_label} and {second_control_label}. What number is on that step?
What numbered step includes both control chips {first_control_label} and {second_control_label}?
Use the control labels {first_control_label} and {second_control_label}. Which step number contains the pair?
Which visible step number has both {first_control_label} and {second_control_label} on the same step?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

scene:instruction_panel.object_description: an instruction panel with numbered steps and visible control chips on each step

query:shared_control_for_step_set_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible control label common to the referenced steps
query:shared_control_for_step_set_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the matching shared control chips in the referenced steps

query:step_for_control_pair_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer step number containing both referenced control labels
query:step_for_control_pair_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the two matching control chips and their step-number badge
